findings.context: video _and_ storytelling. They make your content more impactful, giving you a higher ROI. In fact, [90%](https://www.wyzowl.com/video-marketing-statistics/) of video marketers say video has helped them increase
findings.sentence: In fact, [90%](https://www.wyzowl.com/video-marketing-statistics/) of video marketers say video has helped them increase brand awareness and 39% attribute ROI to brand awareness metrics.
findings.title: Stat needs review: '90%'
findings.suggested_fix: Stat reference: `90%`. Stats can stay relevant for years — only update if the underlying claim is clearly out of date or used as a freshness signal in the article.
